Title: User first access without registration
Preconditions: Application is installed and launched for the first time.
Test Data: - User is not registered.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. System prompts the user to check if they are registered.
3. User confirms they are not registered.
4. System redirects the user to the registration process.
5. Registration process completes successfully.
6. User is redirected to the home page.
Expected Result:
- User is prompted to register.
- Registration process is initiated.
- Upon successful registration, user is redirected to the home page.

Title: User first access with registration
Preconditions: Application is installed and launched for the first time.
Test Data: - User is registered.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. System prompts the user to check if they are registered.
3. User confirms they are registered.
4. System redirects the user to the login process.
5. User logs in successfully.
6. User is redirected to the home page.
Expected Result:
- User is prompted to log in.
- Login process is initiated.
- Upon successful login, user is redirected to the home page.

Title: Start and complete a route
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - User initiates a route.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on 'Start Route'.
2. System confirms the route is in progress.
3. User completes the route.
4. System prompts whether to change sections.
5. User confirms no change in sections.
6. System calculates emissions.
7. User is redirected to the home page.
Expected Result:
- Route starts successfully.
- Route completion triggers emission calculation.
- User is redirected to the home page.

Title: Change section during route
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - User initiates a route.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on 'Start Route'.
2. System confirms the route is in progress.
3. User completes the route.
4. System prompts whether to change sections.
5. User confirms change in sections.
6. User navigates to the horizontal menu.
7. User returns to the route.
8. System calculates emissions.
9. User is redirected to the home page.
Expected Result:
- Route starts successfully.
- Changing sections redirects user to the menu.
- User returns to the route and emission calculation occurs.
- User is redirected to the home page.

Title: View weekly report and navigate menu
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - User wants to view the weekly report.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on 'View Weekly Report'.
2. System displays the weekly report.
3. User navigates to the horizontal menu.
4. User returns to the report.
5. User exits the report.
Expected Result:
- Weekly report is displayed.
- User can navigate to the menu and return to the report.
- Exiting the report ends the session.

Title: View personal data and insert new data
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - User wants to view personal data.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on 'View Personal Data'.
2. System displays personal data.
3. User clicks on 'Insert New Data'.
4. System prompts for new data input.
5. User submits new data.
6. System redirects to the menu.
7. User returns to view personal data.
Expected Result:
- Personal data is displayed.
- Inserting new data redirects to the menu.
- Returning to personal data shows updated information.

Title: Successful login process
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - Valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid credentials.
2. Application inserts credentials into the server.
3. Server verifies credentials against the database.
4. Database returns verified data to the server.
5. Server compares verified data with inserted data.
6. Application logs in the user.
Expected Result:
- Credentials are successfully verified.
- User is logged in.

Title: Failed login process due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - Invalid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters invalid credentials.
2. Application inserts credentials into the server.
3. Server verifies credentials against the database.
4. Database returns no matching data to the server.
5. Server compares verified data with inserted data.
6. Application fails to log in the user.
Expected Result:
- Credentials are not verified.
- User is not logged in.

Title: Dispatch and add a new route
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - User wants to add a new route.
Test Steps:
1. User dispatches to the application.
2. Application starts a new route to the server.
3. Server adds the new route to the database.
4. Database receives the new route from the server.
5. User is redirected back to the home page.
Expected Result:
- New route is added successfully.
- User is redirected to the home page.

Title: Error handling during route addition
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - User tries to add a new route but encounters an error.
Test Steps:
1. User dispatches to the application.
2. Application starts a new route to the server.
3. Server attempts to add the new route to the database.
4. Database encounters an error while receiving the new route.
5. Server handles the error and informs the application.
6. Application informs the user about the error.
Expected Result:
- Error is handled gracefully.
- User is informed about the error.

Title: Edge case: Adding duplicate route
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home page.
Test Data: - User tries to add a route that already exists.
Test Steps:
1. User dispatches to the application.
2. Application starts a new route to the server.
3. Server attempts to add the new route to the database.
4. Database detects the route already exists.
5. Server handles the duplicate entry and informs the application.
6. Application informs the user about the duplicate entry.
Expected Result:
- Duplicate entry is detected.
- User is informed about the duplicate entry.
